title: ngrok TCP Edge
description: A TCP Edge defines a TCP endpoint for non-HTTP protocols with backend and IP restriction configurations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TCP edge.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the edge was created.

uri.description: URI of the edge API resource.

hostports.description: The host:port combinations that this edge listens on.

backend.description: The backend configuration for the TCP edge.
